_comment: Service CATALOG — tracked by git, shared to every server. Defines what CAN run. On/off state and the live port live in runtime.json (untracked, per-server). Add a service here; toggle it via ctl.py or the admin panel. Paths are relative to the LocalServerApps root; {port} is filled from the runtime port (falling back to the default below).

admin-panel.description: This control panel. Recover if toggled off: ctl.py enable admin-panel

shab-train-clock.description: Wall dashboard for the kitchen tablet

psfc-monitor.description: Park Slope Food Coop orientation-slot monitor
